summary: Fixed the HIG-DE-001 source path by removing English presentation copy from the visible Today evening reflection nudge. TodayStore now emits semantic EveningReflectionNudge.Kind values, TodayView formats the visible title/body through existing localized notification.prompt.eveningReflection/homeWrappedReflection keys, and TodayStoreTests assert semantic kind instead of English strings.

contract_status_changes.before: TodayStore.EveningReflectionNudge carried English title/message strings and TodayView rendered those runtime strings verbatim, causing German Today UI to show English reflection nudge copy.
contract_status_changes.after: TodayStore.EveningReflectionNudge carries semantic Kind only. TodayView formats the visible title and body through existing localized notification.prompt.eveningReflection/homeWrappedReflection keys.

residual_risks: German hig-ui-reviewed remains unclaimed until a fresh scoped UI evidence pass is preserved after this fix.

PromptNotification title/body fixture strings in TodayStore remain English for domain test purposes; ReminderScheduler localizes notification copy by PromptNotification.Kind. This slice only fixed the visible Today nudge path.
